CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-27-2015 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-12-2015 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On May-12-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: Appearance by Sheila Pham, Esq. for Defendant; No appearance by Plaintiff. Defendant's counsel reported the case settled. An Order to Show Cause pursuant to CRC 3.1385 is set to MAY-12-2015 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. JUDGE JOHN K. STEWART; Clerk EBura; Proceedings not reported. (610)

Mtn To Compel Pltf'S To Produce Further Responses To Form Interoggs
Off Calendar Jan-21-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Sheila Pham, Esq. of Kaufman Dolowich & Voluck LLP, Tel. 415.926.7627, for defendant and moving party;
No other appearance.

RULING: Defendant's counsel stipulated to the judge pro tem. There being no objection, the Court adopted the tentative ruling. DEFENDANT THE REGENTS OF THE UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA'S Motion To Compel Plaintiff To Produce Further Responses To Form Interrogatories is Granted. No opposition filed. Sanctions are awarded against David Arnold in the amount of $3,280, to be paid within 10 days of service of this order upon him. ORDER SIGNED. Judge Pro Tem: Charles Geerhart; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.
